notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Gleyber Torres out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Gleyber Torres out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith pops out to third baseman David Hamilton.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick. Kevin McGonigle scores.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a ground ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Gleyber Torres to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo singles on a ground ball to third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo walks. Brandon Lockridge to 3rd. David Hamilton to 2nd.
